Official Digital Factory Partner
We provide genuine license keys & solutions

Our store is trusted by global creative and manufacturing professionals. We deliver official Digital Factory 11 license keys and provide secure, verified transactions through PayPal. Our software integrates seamlessly with CorelDRAW, Autodesk, and Adobe design environments — ensuring smooth and efficient production workflows.

Why Choose CADlink
Digital Factory 11?

CADLINK Digital Factory 11 DTF is the ultimate professional printing software for DTF producers, apparel decorators, and digital print shops. It's engineered to provide the most precise color accuracy and production efficiency in the industry.

Advanced Color Management & White Ink Control
Automated Production Tools for High Volume
Powerful RIP Technology for Consistent Quality
Purpose-built for Direct-to-Film (DTF) Printing

Professional-Grade RIP

Industry-leading processing speeds and halftone control for the most demanding production environments.

Universal Compatibility

Supports a wide range of DTF printers, from desktop conversions to large-format industrial machines.

Instant Activation

Receive your genuine license key within minutes of purchase and start printing immediately.

See Digital Factory 11 in Action

Watch how easy it is to create perfect halftones and manage your DTF workflow.

Printers Compatible with Cadlink v11

Below is a list of printers confirmed to work with Cadlink v11. Update this list based on your supported devices.

  • •Epson SureColor 8550 (Epson 8550)
  • •Epson SureColor F2100 Series
  • •Roland DG Series (models compatible via driver)
  • •Mimaki UJF Series
  • •Ricoh Ri 1000 / Ri 2000
  • •Brother GTX / GTX Pro
  • •DTG M2 / M6 Industrial Series
  • •Any printer supported via Cadlink driver set

are saying about us

Average

Excellent Service

Based on 4,317 reviews

S

Sarah M.

2 days ago

Outstanding color accuracy and speed!

I'm using the trial version while waiting on my purchase to arrive. The color accuracy is something I haven't seen before—greens, purples, pinks, all coming out almost perfect. The best part: It actually prints twice as fast!

Verified Purchase
J

James R.

1 day ago

Great colour accuracy and "pop"

I upgraded from v10 to v11 and it's pretty much the same, for what I do anyway. My humble opinion is… You could have snuck into my house, upgraded 10 to 11 for me and I would not have noticed. Key praise: colour accuracy, print-speed, "pop" of colours.

Verified Purchase
M

Maria L.

8 days ago

Worth every penny at work

We have CADlink Digital Factory v11 at work—small improvements over v10, but still worth every penny. While the jump from v10 →v11 may be modest, the overall quality makes it essential for our DTF production.

Designer

System Requirements

Ensure smooth performance and fast rendering with these recommended specifications for CADlink Digital Factory 11.

Operating System

Windows 11 / 10

64-bit (Version 1809 or higher)

Processor

3+ GHz Processor

Recommended (2.5 GHz Minimum)

Memory (RAM)

16 GB Recommended

8 GB Minimum required

Display Resolution

1920 x 1080

True Color display supported

Graphics Card

4 GB GPU (DX12)

DirectX 11 compatible minimum

Disk Space

10 GB Free Space

SSD recommended for best performance

Pro Tip: Use an SSD

Installing Digital Factory 11 on a Solid State Drive (SSD) significantly improves processing and ripping speeds.
